details.test: Task 1: Book family general admission visit
Task 2: Build self-guided tour route under 90 minutes
Task 3: Longest English guided tour under €25 on 2026-08-10
Task 4: Build reading list of 3 short aging articles (1800-1950)
Task 5: Register family for weekend June workshop under €40
Task 6: Pin 3 ancient and 2 modern timeline events
Task 7: Add 3 qualifying books to cart and select standard shipping
Task 8: Subscribe to newsletter with interests and monthly frequency
